items.name: Gilded Wings of Glory
items.description: These fabulous wings aren't made of wax! Go ahead- fly as close to the sun as you like! They're the genuine article!

items.name: Wings of Liberty
items.description: "Where liberty dwells, there is my country."

items.name: Interstellar Wings
items.description: Soar on the solar winds!

items.name: Guardian Angel Wings
items.description: Pair of angel wings to wear on the back.

items.name: Royal Faerie Wings
items.description: "Swift as a shadow, short as any dream; / Brief as the lightning in the collied night."

items.name: Mid-Summer Cape
items.description: A fashionable cape for summer nights.

items.name: Sakuranantoka - Blossom Bow And Quiver
items.description: Your bow is blessed by the spirit of spring herself, and your arrows always find their mark. This is an accessory though, ever-ready on your back.

items.name: Old Glory Wings
items.description: Oh say can you see / by the dawn's early light / These beautiful wings / of freedom's flight.

items.name: Recycled Wings
items.description: Home made wings are the best, just ask my friend Icarus.
